steps: Contact Deutsche Bank Custody to request refund of EUR 3,093.75 overpayment on DBK dividend (account 801234567)
Provide DE-NO tax treaty documentation showing 26.375% rate applies vs. 25% withheld
Submit formal reclaim through Deutsche Bank's dividend services department with treaty rate calculation
If custodian disputes, escalate to BZSt for official treaty rate confirmation

references.title: BZSt – Withholding Tax Relief (exemption & refund procedures)
